plugin.description: Manage Pippit accounts, generate Seedream images, and create, inspect, save, preview, and regenerate video jobs through one MCP server.

defaultPrompt: List the available Pippit video models
List the available Pippit image models
Generate a Seedream image from this prompt and reference image
interface.longDescription: Use the bundled Pippit MCP server to securely enroll and select facade-managed Access Keys, generate Seedream 5.0/5.0 Pro images, and submit asynchronous video generation or reference-guided regeneration jobs with private local previews.

plugin.name: pippit-video
